Pri.H-2012 Male Employee Bottom Quartile: Pri-2012 Headcount-weighted Mortality Table - Male Employee Bottom Quartile. Ages 18-80. Base Year January 1, 2012 - December 31, 2012.

Study Data: The primary focus of this study was a comprehensive review of recent mortality experience of private-sector retirement plans in the United States. The final dataset upon which this study has been based includes approximately 16 million life-years of exposure and 343 thousand deaths from private pension plans across the United States.  Data certified: 05/2019.
